pageContext.name: Mr. Snuggles Puppet
pageContext.description: Trick or Treat Studios and Lionsgate are proud to present the Officially Licensed Spiral: From The Book of Saw Mr. Snuggles Puppet Prop Replica!  This amazing prop was sculpted by Mark Anthony, the absolute King of replica movie props and owner of The Scary Closet.  Every detail of the screen-used Mr. Snuggles is represented in this prop. The head, hands, and feet are made of vinyl for ultimate durability and accuracy. The head has a sculpted attached hat and ears attached via interlocked eyelets allowing them to move freely. The body is made in flexible polyurethane foam with an ultra-strong wireframe. The puppet comes fully clothed in distress uniform with a shirt, tie, pants, and a jacket featuring a vinyl star badge. It includes the screen-accurate small vinyl pistol.  The puppet stands approximately 16.5' tall and comes in a beautiful full-color collectors window box.   Horror fans! The next chapter of Saw awaits, and Mr. Snuggles needs a home! Add to your collection today!
